over_link_2GT_tracks.note: 19% baseline noise floor from single-cam homography; relink adds negligible -> safe

analytics_speed_bands.note: UNCHANGED after relink -> inflation is homography/in-view-bias, not fragmentation

verdict: appearance-free re-linking cuts raw IDs 18-27% SAFELY but does NOT improve GT identity stability (purity flat 0.116, IDF1 flat) or analytics magnitude. Fragmentation is occlusion-dominated mid-stream hopping + unstable detection -> motion-only cannot reach clean tracks; appearance useless on identical kits. Human tag-per-clip remains REQUIRED.
